about_blooma.title: About Blooma
about_blooma.subtitle: Supporting safer prenatal wellness with care, structure, and trust

content.hero_subtitle: Designed to make pregnancy fitness feel safer, calmer, and easier to understand

intro_blocks.label: WHO WE ARE
intro_blocks.heading: A Structured Approach to Prenatal Wellness
paragraphs: Blooma is a prenatal wellness application created to support pregnant women through structured exercise, yoga, and walking guidance.
Our goal is to make pregnancy fitness feel safer, calmer, and easier to understand by presenting activities in a clear and supportive way.
Blooma is designed for women who want a more organized approach to prenatal movement, daily wellness, and activity awareness during pregnancy.

items.title: Movement Support
items.description: Structured exercise, yoga, and walking guidance designed for pregnancy.

items.title: Organized Experience
items.description: Activities are presented in a clear, structured, and easy-to-follow format.

items.title: Supportive Design
items.description: A calm and reassuring experience built around maternal wellness.

content.hero_subtitle: Helping women feel confident and guided throughout their journey

intro_blocks.label: OUR MISSION
intro_blocks.heading: Supporting Confidence and Awareness
paragraphs: Our mission is to help pregnant women feel more confident and supported in their wellness journey.
We aim to present prenatal fitness content in a structured way that considers pregnancy stage, comfort, and safer activity selection.
Blooma is built to encourage consistency, awareness, and gentle progress through meaningful wellness support.

items.title: Guided Confidence
items.description: Helping users feel more confident in their prenatal wellness journey.

items.title: Stage-Aware Support
items.description: Content adapts based on pregnancy stage and comfort.

items.title: Gentle Progress
items.description: Encouraging safe, gradual, and consistent movement.

content.hero_subtitle: A connected and structured wellness experience

intro_blocks.label: WHAT BLOOMA OFFERS
intro_blocks.heading: All-in-One Prenatal Wellness Support
paragraphs: Blooma brings together prenatal exercise, yoga, and walking support inside one experience.
The app is designed to help users explore guided activities, stay connected to their routine, and build a healthier relationship with movement during pregnancy.
We focus on clarity, simplicity, and a calm user experience so that wellness support feels approachable and reassuring.

items.title: Guided Activities
items.description: Explore structured exercise, yoga, and walking routines.

items.title: Routine Support
items.description: Stay consistent with daily wellness routines.

items.title: Mindful Experience
items.description: Build a healthier and more aware connection with movement.

content.hero_title: A Trusted Companion for Maternal Wellness
content.hero_subtitle: Designed to support women through every stage of pregnancy

intro_blocks.label: OUR VISION
intro_blocks.heading: A Thoughtful and Supportive Experience
paragraphs: We believe prenatal wellness tools should feel safe, thoughtful, and emotionally supportive.
Blooma aims to become a trusted digital companion for women navigating fitness and self-care during pregnancy.

items.title: Safe & Thoughtful
items.description: Designed with safety and emotional support in mind.

items.title: Trusted Companion
items.description: Supporting women throughout their pregnancy journey.

content.hero_subtitle: Supporting a smooth and connected experience

intro_blocks.label: TECHNOLOGY FOUNDATION
intro_blocks.heading: A Strong and Modern Stack
paragraphs: Blooma is developed using modern iOS frameworks that support performance, reliability, secure health integration, and real-time responsiveness.
These technologies help deliver guided sessions, local data continuity, and a seamless wellness experience across the app.

items.title: Real-Time Updates
items.description: Dynamic UI updates and smooth data flow across the app.

items.title: Local Storage
items.description: Data persistence for continuity and offline support.

items.title: Guided Media
items.description: In-app video support for exercise and yoga sessions.

items.title: Health Integration
items.description: Secure connection with Apple Health and Apple Watch.
